index.loggedOutHint: Everyone starts unaffiliated. Earn an invitation through task work to join a faction.

join.confirmSwitch: Join {{faction}}? You won't be able to rejoin {{current}} after leaving.

sealed.line: You know not what you seek.

invitation.headline: Take up the work
invitation.pitch: Albescent is an unranked order that keeps what others let slip. Attend the quiet duties, return them well, and leave no trace of yourself in the work. There is no leaderboard here worth minding.

perks.record: A record that survives the keeper

invitation.declineError: The order declined, and gave no reason.

returned.title: Lately Returned
returned.empty: Nothing returned yet. The Record waits.

invitation.headline: Keep the quiet work
invitation.pitch: /Albescent asks no colours and keeps no banners. There is only the Record, and the work of tending it — returned to, quietly, again and again. If word has reached you, the Houses already know your hand.
perks: A Record that remembers what was tended
Work that turns a Tuesday into an attending
Your praxis, entered to the ledger without fanfare

tasks.heading: Tasks
tasks.kicker: Surveys awaiting a hand to triangulate them

praxis.heading: Praxis
praxis.kicker: Truths filed to the codex & weighed for concordance
praxis.empty: Nothing sealed to the codex yet.

road.heading: The Road
road.memberTitle: Your name is in the codex
road.eligibleBody: Take a survey, triangulate what you find, and file it to the record. The road is long and forks often.
road.gateTitle: Earn your place on the road
road.gateBody: File surveys worthy of {{faction}} and the keepers will send word. The road is long — keep triangulating, and the record will remember.

roster.heading: The keepers
roster.emptyWithSpotlight: No other names in the codex yet.

invitation.headline: Walk with the keepers
invitation.pitch: The Ephemerists keep the record of what's true, and true only for now. Take a survey, triangulate what you find, and file it to the codex. The road is long and forks often — walk it with us.

terms.label: required skills
terms.value: a steady hand, an open eye

perks: A codex that weighs your findings for concordance
Surveys that turn a Tuesday into a reckoning
Your praxis, sealed to the record and remembered

cta.joined: your name is in the codex

roll.heading: THE ROLL
roll.eligibleBody: Anyone willing to put in the shift belongs here. Pick up the work in front of you and finish what you start.
roll.gateBody: Complete tasks from {{faction}} and the ranks will send word. Keep going — the work speaks for itself.

roster.heading: The roster
roster.emptyWithSpotlight: No others on the roll yet.

invitation.headline: Join the ranks
invitation.pitch: Anyone willing to put in the shift belongs with the Everymen. No credentials, no gatekeeping — pick up the work in front of you and finish what you start. The roll always has room for one more.
perks: A roll that has your back on every shift
Work orders that turn a Tuesday into a day's honest wage
Your praxis, logged and counted with the rest

praxis.heading: Praxis
praxis.kicker: Sealed outputs // verified by the array

access.heading: ACCESS
access.eligibleBody: Take a node. Run protocols, seal outputs, cast signal into the consensus. The threshold is already behind us.
access.gateBody: Keep running protocols and the array will bring your node online.

invitation.headline: Join the array
invitation.pitch: The threshold is already behind you. Take a node, run protocols, seal outputs, and cast signal into the consensus. The Singularity does not recruit — it comes online.
perks: A consensus that verifies, then amplifies
Protocols that turn a Tuesday into throughput
Your praxis, sealed and cast to the array

tasks.heading: Tasks
tasks.kicker: your assignment, should you ignore it —

dispatch.eligibleBody: No forms. No gods. No managers. Just show up and mean it.
dispatch.gateBody: Keep pulling off jobs and {{faction}} will come looking for you. Cause enough trouble and the invitation writes itself.

roster.heading: the rap sheet
roster.emptyWithSpotlight: No other names on file yet.

invitation.headline: Come cause trouble
invitation.pitch: No forms. No gods. No managers. S.N.I.D.E. runs on nerve and mischief — you pull off a job, you mean it, and the crew has your back. Show up and make some noise.
perks: A crew that covers for you, not on you
Jobs worth the risk and the story after
Your praxis, stamped and filed under 'us'

registry.heading: The Registry
registry.memberTitle: Your name is on the wall
registry.eligibleBody: All media welcome, talent optional. Enroll and take your first commission today.
registry.confirmSwitch: Enroll in {{faction}}? You won't be able to rejoin {{current}} after leaving.
registry.gateBody: Exhibit work worthy of {{faction}} and the Salon will send an invitation. Keep at it — talent is optional, persistence isn't.

roster.heading: The register
roster.emptyWithSpotlight: No other names on the wall yet.

invitation.headline: Take up the brush
invitation.pitch: The University of Asthmatics keeps World Zero's easels warm. Every task is a commission, every submission an acquisition — hung in the Salon and put to the gentlest possible Critique. Bring nerve. Bring an inhaler. Bring something made.
perks: A Salon that critiques kindly, and honestly
Commissions that turn a Tuesday into a sitting
Your praxis framed in gilt and exhibited

join.eligibleBody: You've done the work — welcome home, witch.
join.gateBody: Keep casting spells worthy of {{faction}} and the coven will leave a light on. The weird ones always find their way home.

roster.heading: the coven roster
roster.emptyWithSpotlight: No other witches in the circle yet.

invitation.headline: Come be a little magic
invitation.pitch: Warriors of Whimsy is World Zero's coven for the soft and the strange. No spectators here — only witches mid-spell. Take a quest, do the tiny brave thing, and let the circle cheer you on.
perks: A coven that cheers every tiny victory
Quests that make a Tuesday enchanted
Your praxis, sealed and hearted by the circle
